Looking for a Maha mantra picture, please

Other · asked by user [] · 2009-12-03 · 5 answers
Greetings.

I am looking for a digital picture of the Maha mantra, in Latin transliteration with diacritics, on saffron background, of a size suitable for making a good photographic print of about 10x15 cm.

Does anyone have such a picture or knows where to find it? I would really appreciate it!

user [447] · 2009-12-15
This is what I needed the picture for - my Green Book. Its actually a small photo album (convenient because pictures and sheets of paper can be easily changed) that I have as a brief summary of some basic attitudes and advice for my spiritual practice. I attached a picture of a few pages.
